title: Mapouria chaenotricha

This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its classification reflects its botanical relationships with other species within this family. Mapouria chaenotricha is often placed in the genus Mapouria, which is part of the larger order Magnoliales. The classification of Mapouria chaenotricha is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaves and flowers, and its genetic relationships to other species. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Mapouria chaenotricha within the Annonaceae family.
